name: protein-design-skills
description: Agent-agnostic protein design pipeline — 79 skills + 22 hooks + 19 scripts for RFdiffusion, ProteinMPNN, AlphaFold3, Boltz-1, Chai-1, and 15+ other tools. Covers backbone generation, sequence design, structure validation, and quality filtering.

plugins.name: protein-design-skills
plugins.description: End-to-end protein design orchestration plugin. Provides 79 skills including 76 workflow skills and 3 project-level doc-maintenance skills, 22 automation hooks (context injection, GPU checks, error recovery, pipeline orchestration), and 19 standalone scripts for direct tool execution.
